title: Cleavage region organizes the structural architecture of the SINE-derived B2 repressive ribozyme
author: Chaudhury, Susmit Narayan

description: Python script applies a smooth, window-based correction to the raw electropherogram, enabling more accurate peakcomparisons along the entire RNA length
